name: live-signal-trading-system
description: Live Signal Trading System for Indian Markets with TradingView and Screener Integration

scripts.install:all: npm run install:apps && npm run install:dashboard
scripts.install:apps: cd apps/market-data-collector && npm install && cd ../tradingview-integration && npm install && cd ../screener-integration && npm install && cd ../signal-engine && npm install && cd ../breakout-analysis && npm install
scripts.build:apps: cd apps/market-data-collector && npm run build && cd ../tradingview-integration && npm run build && cd ../screener-integration && npm run build && cd ../signal-engine && npm run build && cd ../breakout-analysis && npm run build
scripts.dev: echo 'Starting all services...' && npm run dev:services
scripts.dev:services: concurrently "npm run start:market-data" "npm run start:tradingview" "npm run start:screener" "npm run start:signal-engine" "npm run start:breakout"
scripts.logs: echo 'Check individual service logs in their respective directories'
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run build:all
